# Ice & Instinct

> Ice & Instinct is a private mixology studio founded by Teimuraz Benidze, serving the New York metropolitan area and New Jersey. We bring bespoke cocktail rituals to private residences, penthouses, and events. By appointment only. Service is offered in four tiers from $650 to $3,000+, plus optional concierge enhancements. The studio also dispatches vetted event bartenders on call across NYC and New Jersey, flat packages from $450. Professional clear ice and temperature control are standard in every evening.

Last updated: 2026-06-10. This file is generated from the live site; prices and policies below match the published pages.

## Business facts

- **Name:** Ice & Instinct
- **Founder:** Teimuraz Benidze - Founder & Flavor Architect; three decades of wine and service; in New York since 2016; the first certified sommelier in Georgia's history. Credentials: Certificat Wine & Sommellerie (Chateau-Arnoux, France), Leading Qualified Sommelier (Georgian Sommelier Association / ASI), Diploma in Wines & Spirits (Enotria Wine World, Moscow), French Wine Studies (O.N.I.VINS).
- **Operating area:** New York metropolitan area and New Jersey (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Westchester, the Hamptons, Greenwich, North NJ). Events further out are welcome; travel is included in the private quote.
- **Model:** By appointment only. Established 2024.
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +1 (917) 292-7859
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/iceinstinctnyc/
- **Booking:** each tier page links directly to scheduling (YouCanBook.me); inquiries via https://www.iceinstinct.com/contact/ with a personal reply within one business day.

## Service tiers (live prices)

| Tier | Price | Guests | Duration | Focus |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| The Foundation | from $650 USD | up to 15 | 3 hours | Impeccable classics, seamless service ($75 per extra hour) |
| Perfection in Simplicity | from $900 USD | up to 12 | 4 hours | Curated classics, masterful solo performance |
| Bespoke Design & Artistry | from $1,800 USD | up to 30 | 4 hours | Custom signature menu built around your story |
| Omakase Improvisation | from $3,000 USD | up to 25 | open-ended | No menu; real-time creation in dialogue with the room |

Any tier scales with a full bar team for larger events - weddings, galas, corporate gatherings - quoted on request.

## What is included

- The bar setup, tools, and end-to-end service are fully handled.
- Professional clear ice and temperature control are STANDARD in every evening (sourced at supplier cost).
- Spirits and wine are NOT included in the tier price: the host provides them, or we purchase on the host's behalf at supplier cost.
- Curated glassware, rentals, and other enhancements are arranged through the Concierge and billed at supplier cost.

## Concierge enhancements (optional, with any tier)

- Bespoke Cigar Curator - $500
- Additional Bar Staff - $350
- The Curator (sourcing and styling) - $350
- Glassware & Vessels - $250
- Ice & Temperature - standard in every evening, never an upsell

## Payment and policies

- A flat $500 deposit reserves the date; the balance is due before the event.
- Cancellation: more than 14 days before the event the deposit is fully refunded; within 14 days it is non-refundable but transferable to a future date within 12 months, subject to availability; within 48 hours the full booking value is due.
- A full zero-proof (non-alcoholic) program is available with the same care.
- NDAs available on request; certificates of insurance can be issued for venues.

## The Collection

Thirteen signature compositions at https://www.iceinstinct.com/gallery/ - each built once, for one evening: White Lotus, Aviation, Persimmon Saffron Sour, Belladonna, Black Truffle Martini, Rose Garden Rendezvous, Aureliano, Basil in my mind, 1001 Nights, Call Me By Your Name, Calipso Cream, Besame, Negroni Verde. The interactive Palate Profiler on the same page composes a personal signature from three sensory questions.

- [The Collection](https://www.iceinstinct.com/gallery/): thirteen signature cocktails + Palate Profiler
- [Inquire](https://www.iceinstinct.com/contact/): form, WhatsApp, phone
- [Weddings](https://www.iceinstinct.com/weddings/): wedding bar service - his-and-hers signatures, full bar team, zero-proof program
- [Corporate](https://www.iceinstinct.com/corporate/): corporate event bar - invoicing, COI, omakase as entertainment
- [Gift an Evening](https://www.iceinstinct.com/gift/): gift certificates $650 / $900, valid 12 months, framed certificate
- [New Jersey](https://www.iceinstinct.com/new-jersey/): home base - no tunnel tolls, no Manhattan premium, same-week dates realistic
- [Manhattan](https://www.iceinstinct.com/manhattan/): penthouses and doorman buildings - COI and freight elevator handled
- [The Hamptons](https://www.iceinstinct.com/hamptons/): summer estates, Southampton to Montauk - book before peak season
- [Westchester & Greenwich](https://www.iceinstinct.com/westchester-greenwich/): estate towns - Scarsdale, Rye, Bedford, backcountry
- [Journal](https://www.iceinstinct.com/journal/): cocktail omakase explained, clear ice physics, cigar pairing method
- [Event Bartenders](https://www.iceinstinct.com/events/): the ICE floor - vetted event bartenders on call, flat packages from $450 (1 bartender / 4h), pairs $850, wedding teams from $1,200
- [Join the Bench](https://www.iceinstinct.com/work-with-us/): event bartender work, flat $180-240 per 4-hour event, same-day payout
- [Press & Media](https://www.iceinstinct.com/press/): founder bios, fact sheet, media kit
- [Full site text](https://www.iceinstinct.com/llms-full.txt): every page as plain text in one file
